description_long: This apartment building features a rectangular footprint with a prominent, sloped red-tiled roof and a slightly raised central section. The facade is characterized by a regular grid of windows, with the front side displaying a central entrance canopy and a small set of stairs leading up to the main doors. The exterior walls are finished in a light beige and white color scheme, with darker accents around the window frames. The building appears to have three stories, each with evenly spaced windows, and the ground floor includes a recessed entryway. The structure is likely constructed from reinforced concrete and brick, with glass windows and metal or wooden doors. The overall design is functional and symmetrical, suitable for urban residential use.
description: A three-story apartment building with a red-tiled sloped roof, light-colored walls, and a symmetrical grid of windows. The front features a central entrance with a canopy and stairs.
description_view_0: This view shows the side and partial front of the building, highlighting the sloped roof and the regular arrangement of windows.
description_view_1: The front view displays the main entrance with a canopy, stairs, and the symmetrical window layout across all floors.
description_view_2: This view presents the opposite side of the building, emphasizing the roof's shape and the consistent window pattern.
description_view_3: The rear view reveals a plain facade with no visible entrance, maintaining the window grid and light color scheme.
attribute_window_arrangement: The windows are arranged in a symmetrical, evenly spaced grid pattern across all visible facades, with each floor having a consistent alignment and grouping.
